degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial redaction-policy review requested tests for non-encrypted sensitive Summary.Name whole-summary omission, oversized summary field keys, and canonical lexical retention order.
Initial no-network review requested full-snapshot sensitive sentinel non-leakage, not only original key omission checks.
Updated tests to cover sensitive api-key summary names, oversized summary field keys, canonical-order overflow with raw-uppercase Z-overflow, and recursive no-network snapshot leak checks.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
